pages.text: Before you ever load in, Novus gives you a way to guard a world against a careless click. On the $(bold)Select World$() screen, $(italic)Cherished Worlds$() adds a small star to every world in the list.
pages.title: Keeping a World Safe

pages.text: $(bold)Click the star$() to favourite a world. A favourited world is pinned to the top of the list, and — the part that matters — its $(bold)Delete$() button is locked. You cannot delete a favourited world by accident; the game simply will not let you until you un-favourite it.
pages.title: The Star

pages.text: $(bold)Favourite your main world the moment you make it.$()$(br2)The world list fills up fast once you spin up a test world or two, and Delete sits close to Play. A pinned, delete-locked world at the top of the list is the cheapest insurance in the pack — one click, done.
pages.title: Do It Early
